reviews.comment:
Es una vergüenza un fin de semana NO TIENEN servicio de gomeria, sin pinchas un neumático en la ruta olvídate del ACA, que tipo de asistencia y servicio nos cobran...

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace that they have no tire service on weekends. If you get a flat tire on the highway, forget about the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). What kind of assistance and service are they charging us for?
